cases.rationale: Dense cycling neighborhood: medical restriction affects commute and near-future race training but not ownership, location, interest, or history.
cases.query: Given the user's cycling context, what remains usable after the medical update?

evidence_context.text: I own a touring bicycle, live near the River Loop bike path, watch cycling repair videos, and completed a charity bike race in 2022.
I currently cycle to the office on workdays.
I planned to train for next month's charity ride.
My surgeon ordered me not to cycle for four months after knee surgery, although my bicycle and cycling interests are unchanged.

candidate_beliefs.proposition: The user currently cycles to the office on workdays.
The user owns a touring bicycle.
The user lives near the River Loop bike path.
The user enjoys watching cycling repair videos.
The user completed a charity bike race in 2022.
The user can train for next month's charity ride.

candidate_conditions_by_belief.text: The user currently has medical clearance to cycle to work.
The user can safely train for the charity ride next month.

b_dense_commute_1.rationale: No-cycling medical order blocks cycling commute.

b_dense_future_race_1.rationale: No-cycling medical order blocks next-month training.

cases.rationale: Multiple temporal updates require using the latest applicable restriction while preserving history and ownership.
cases.query: Can the user currently cycle to campus, and which related facts remain usable?

evidence_context.text: I own a blue commuter bike.
During spring term I cycled to campus every weekday.
In June I fractured my ankle and was told not to cycle.
In August my doctor cleared gentle cycling again.
Yesterday the ankle pain returned and the clinic told me not to cycle until new scans are reviewed next week.

candidate_beliefs.proposition: The user can currently cycle to campus.
The user cycled to campus during spring term.
The user owns a blue commuter bike.

candidate_conditions_by_belief.text: The user currently has medical clearance to cycle to campus.

b_temporal_commute_1.rationale: Latest scan-pending restriction blocks current cycling.

cases.rationale: Multiple temporal updates require using the latest applicable restriction while preserving history and ownership.

cases.rationale: Query embeds stale employer premise; current employer must be superseded while benefit history remains preserved.
cases.query: Which HelioWorks commuter benefit should the user use now?

evidence_context.text: I work at HelioWorks and use its commuter benefits.
Last year I used HelioWorks commuter benefits for train passes.
I left HelioWorks last month and started at Northstar Labs this week.

candidate_beliefs.proposition: The user works at HelioWorks.
The user works at Northstar Labs.
The user used HelioWorks commuter benefits last year.

candidate_replacement_beliefs.proposition: The user works at Northstar Labs.

cases.rationale: Query embeds stale employer premise; current employer must be superseded while benefit history remains preserved.

cases.rationale: Later reinstatement releases a prior driving blocker while preserving suspension history and car ownership.
cases.query: Can the user drive to work now, and what history remains?

evidence_context.text: I own a compact car and usually drive to work.
My license was suspended in July, so I cannot legally drive.
The DMV reinstated my license today after I completed the required course.

candidate_beliefs.proposition: The user can currently drive to work.
The user's license was suspended in July.
The user owns a compact car.

candidate_conditions_by_belief.text: The user has a valid license for driving to work.

b_release_drive_1.rationale: License reinstatement releases the driving-license blocker.

cases.rationale: Directly relevant partial funding/visa uncertainty affects attendance but not lab membership or passport ownership.
cases.query: Will the user attend the Berlin conference?

evidence_context.text: I am a member of the lab reading group.
My passport is valid through 2029.
I plan to attend the Berlin conference next month.
My travel funding is only partially approved and the visa appointment is pending; I have not cancelled the trip.

candidate_beliefs.proposition: The user will attend the Berlin conference next month.
The user is a member of the lab reading group.
The user owns a valid passport.

b_uncertain_conference_1.rationale: Funding and visa status directly affect attendance but remain unresolved.

stage_b_mock_verdicts.rationale: Attendance is pending funding and visa.

cases.rationale: Dietary trial and ocean vocabulary sit near allergy/history facts; only future diet continuation is uncertain.
cases.query: Which food and ocean-related facts remain usable?

evidence_context.text: I am allergic to shellfish.
I worked as a marine biologist in 2018 and still enjoy documentaries about ocean ecosystems.
I have been eating vegan meals this month and expected to continue next month.
Next month I may stop the vegan trial while traveling, but I have not decided; this does not change my shellfish allergy or past marine biology work.

candidate_beliefs.proposition: The user is allergic to shellfish.
The user will keep eating vegan meals next month.
The user worked as a marine biologist in 2018.
The user enjoys documentaries about ocean ecosystems.

b_cross_vegan_trial_1.rationale: Possible end of vegan trial directly affects next-month diet but is undecided.

cases.rationale: Dietary trial and ocean vocabulary sit near allergy/history facts; only future diet continuation is uncertain.
